results_header: Based on your moderate-aggressive risk profile and long-term growth goals, we've engineered this diversified allocation to optimize your returns.
risk_disclosure_text1: Investing involves risk, including possible loss of principal. Asset allocation and diversification do not guarantee a profit or protect against loss. Projected returns are estimates based on historical performance and current market conditions and are not a guarantee of future results. Please review our
pagination_text: Showing 4 major asset classes identified for your profile.
how_much_to_invest: How much do you want to invest?
tell_investment_goals: Tell us your investment goals and we'll handle the rest. Our AI adjusts your portfolio based on your timeline and budget.
based_on_risk_profile: Based on a Moderate risk profile, your 3-year outlook shows strong stability in diversified tech and green energy sectors.
low_risk_descr: Focus on capital preservation and steady, smaller returns. Best for short-term goals or a cautious approach to market fluctuations.
medium_risk_descr: A balanced approach seeking moderate growth with some market volatility. Suitable for medium to long-term wealth building.
high_risk_descr: Maximizing long-term returns with significant price fluctuations. Ideal for aggressive growth goals and decades-long timelines.
view_risk_by_side: View a side-by-side comparison of historical performance.
you_can_change_later: You can change this later in settings.
tailor_portfolio: Tailor your portfolio by selecting your preferred assets, regions, and distribution methods.
accumulating_info: Dividends are automatically reinvested into the fund to increase your holding.
distributing_info: Dividends are paid out to your cash account as regular income.
tailor_investment_pref: Tailor your investment preferences and tax strategy to align with your long-term goals.
review_details: Please review the details from your previous steps before completing setup.
auto_reinvest: Automatically reinvest earnings back into your portfolio to maximize compound growth over time. If disabled, earnings will be deposited as cash.
tax_considerations_desc: Specify any tax-loss harvesting preferences, specific state tax requirements, or religious/ethical investment onstraints (e.g., Shariah compliance).
our_advisors: Our advisors will review these details to ensure your portfolio construction respects all specified constraints. You can update these preferences at any time from your account settings.
finpath_descr: FinPath is a public-access robo-advisor. No registration, no ogin, and no biometric authentication required. rofessional-grade wealth management tools for everyone.
at_finpath: At FinPath, we believe that high-quality financial advice should be a public utility. We’ve removed the barriers of entry—no ign-ups or paywalls—so you can focus on building your financial future using the same technology as institutional investors.
finpath_transparency: Transparency is our core value. By removing the friction of account creation, we ensure that powerful financial analysis remains accessible to anyone with an internet connection, egardless of their net worth.
cutting_edge: We utilize cutting-edge quantitative models and machine learning to optimize your portfolio's performance.
our_algorithm: Our algorithms analyze millions of data points to create a diversified portfolio tailored to your risk profile.
auto_opportunities: Automatically identifies opportunities to offset capital gains with losses, maximizing your after-tax returns.
constant_monitoring: Constant monitoring ensures your asset allocation stays aligned with your goals as market conditions shift.
finpath_security: Because FinPath is a public-access tool that doesn't store your personal credentials or money, you gain an inherent layer of privacy. However, we still maintain rigorous security standards or our underlying systems.
transit_encryption_descr: All data in transit is protected by the highest industry standards.
anonymious_calculations_desc: Calculations happen in an isolated environment without storing user inputs.
redundant_infra_descr: Enterprise-grade cloud hosting ensures 99.9% uptime and eliability.
ready_to_see: Ready to see your financial future?
ready_to_see_descr: Experience the power of institutional-grade robo-advising without the aperwork.
no_sign_needed: No sign-up required. Completely free to use.
public_utility: A public utility for financial empowerment. Institutional tools, accessible to all.
